UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tim Carrico is present.
Attorney CindyLee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Sarah Camiso and Justin Ricciardi are present.
Attorney Esther Kim representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-09-2012 remains on calendar.
